generated_doNotEdit.title: Redstone Consumer
generated_doNotEdit.description:
A component describing how a block can consume and potentially propogate a redstone signal. This component is not availabe for block permutations.
Experimental toggles required: Upcoming Creator Features (in format versions before 1.26.0)

fields.title: Min Power
fields.description: Optional minimum value for incoming signal stregth. If signal strength is greater than or equal to this value then the 'onRedstoneUpdate' event is sent to Scripts. Defaults to 0 meaning event is always emitted.

fields.title: Propagates Power
fields.description: Optional Boolean to control whether a signal can pass through this block or not, defaults to false.
